passives.name: Unique Attribute
passives.description: Unique Attribute: +20% Hybrid Lifesteal Unique Passive - Recharge: Increases Magic Power by 5 after dealing Magic Damage (this effect stacks up to 6 times and can only gain 1 stack every 0.4 seconds). When reaching full stacks, increases Magic Damage by 12% for 5 seconds.
